phase.name: Core Buffer + Read/Write
phase.task: Set up Cargo project with dependencies
Implement errors.rs — error types + MCP error mapping
Implement encoding.rs — encoding detection, line ending handling
Implement buffer.rs — Buffer struct (rope, metadata, undo stack)
Implement tools/read.rs — file_open, file_read, file_info params
Implement tools/write.rs — file_edit, file_insert, file_delete, file_create, file_undo, file_redo, file_close params
Implement main.rs — MCP server wiring via rmcp (11 tools wired)
Build + register — release binary 3.8MB, registered in settings.json
phase.notes: - Fixed linker issue: Git's link.exe was shadowing MSVC. Need PATH override for builds. - Fixed schemars import: need `use rmcp::schemars::{self, JsonSchema}` in tool param files. - Fixed similar API: v2.7 uses .header() builder, not old_range()/new_range() methods. - Fixed ServerInfo: use .new() + .with_instructions(), not struct literal (non-exhaustive). - Build command: export PATH="/c/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/BuildTools/VC/Tools/MSVC/14.39.33519/bin/Hostx64/x64:$PATH" && cargo build --release

phase.name: Tree-sitter + Structural Navigation
phase.task: Write tag query .scm files (Python, JS/TS, Rust, Go minimum)
Integrate incremental re-parsing into buffer edit flow
Add remaining grammars (Java, C, C++, C#, Ruby, Bash, JSON)

phase.name: File Watching + Undo/Redo
phase.task: Wire watcher into Engine — external change detection
Add externally_modified flag to all read responses

phase.name: Polish + Integration
phase.task: Release build + end-to-end test with Claude Code

log.entry: All Phase 1 source files created. 11 tools wired into rmcp server.
Fixed linker, schemars, similar API, ServerInfo issues. Debug build passes.
Release build successful. forge.exe = 3.8MB. Registered in ~/.claude/settings.json.
